The test could not be run — the large ring's colored arc segments are not exposed as interactive controls in the page's accessible/interactive tree, so the requested click on the ring arc for iteration 2 cannot be performed.

Observations:
- The page exposes interactive "Seek to iteration N" diamond controls (aria-labels) that are indexed and clickable; no indexed interactive arc element for the large Loop ring is present.
